spec_match.rationale: Record-then-replay with a 6-test contract covering parent dispatch, sub-event type, per-side target preservation, offsetX/Y preservation, and isTrusted=false.

interactive.rationale: Real pointer recording, replay button, results table with pass/fail per contract.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Blurb promises record/replay + 6-point contract — page delivers.

edge_cases.rationale: isTrusted=false test is a great inclusion.

openQuestions.title: Persist the recorded path across sessions
openQuestions.detail: localStorage roundtrip of the most-recent recorded path would let visitors compare contract results across Chrome versions without redrawing.

summary: Resolved the required ChromeStatus reference; 1 follow-up question(s) remain.
